tags.name: Tomorrowland Monorail Station
tags.note: The final departing monorail leaves at exactly park closing. Please be at station before closing to board final monorail for a one-way trip to Downtown Disney Station.
tags.note:historic: First Daily operating monorail-type rail system to open in the entire Western Hemisphere
